zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana De Furnival於大約1263年出生在英國哈普爾伯頓時，她的父親Gerard de Furnival30歲，母親Maud FitzJohn28歲。她於1284年之前與William de Eylesford II在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1295年在英國英格蘭盧特藍德卡爾德可特享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christiana De Furnival于大约1263年出生在英国哈普爾伯頓时，她的父亲Gerard de Furnival30岁，母亲Maud FitzJohn28岁。她于1284年之前与William de Eylesford II在英国英格兰薩默塞特福洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1295年在英国英格兰盧特藍德卡爾德可特享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana De Furnival was born about 1263, in Burton, Hampshire, England, her father, Gerard de Furnival, was 30 and her mother, Maud FitzJohn, was 28. She married William de Eylesford II before 1284, in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1295, in Caldecott, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana De Furnival est née environ 1263, à Burton, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Gerard de Furnival, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud FitzJohn, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William d’Eylesford II avant 1284, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1295, à Caldecott, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, Englan: Burton Latimer, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Christiana De Furnival um 1263 in Burton, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerard de Furnival 30 und ihre Mutter Maud FitzJohn 28. Sie hat vor 1284 in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom William de Eylesford II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1295 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Caldecott, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana De Furnival è nata il circa 1263 nel Burton, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Gerard de Furnival, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maud FitzJohn, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William de Eylesford II prima del 1284, nel Frome, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1295, nel Caldecott, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christiana De Furnivalが約1263年にイギリスハンプシュアイアブルトンで生まれた時，父Gerard de Furnivalは30歳，母Maud FitzJohnは28歳であった。1284年以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトフロメでWilliam de Eylesford IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1295年にイギリスイギリスルトランドカルデコットで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana De Furnival(이)가 대략 1263년 영국 함프실르 버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerard de Furnival(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud FitzJohn(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1284년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프롬에서 William de Eylesford II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 캘데컷에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana De Furnival nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Burton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gerard de Furnival, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud FitzJohn, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Eylesford II antes 1284, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1295, em Caldecott, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana De Furnival родилась около 1263 г. в местности буртон, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gerard de Furnival было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud FitzJohn, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Eylesford II перед 1284 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1295 г. в местности калдекотт, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

Se casó con William de Eylesford II antes de 1284, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1295, en Caldecott, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
